title: Senior Doctor - Jaypee Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Jaypee Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Jaypee Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jaypee Hospital:
Jaypee Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital!
